tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold Vite + React + TS project
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A building, committable Vite+React+TS skeleton at the repo root — scaffolded with create-vite, managed with pnpm — replacing the old static index.html.

**Files:**
- Create (scaffolded): `package.json`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`, `tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.app.json`, `tsconfig.node.json`, `vite.config.ts`, `eslint.config.js`, `.gitignore`, `src/*`
- Modify: `index.html` (template entry, retitled)
- Create: `src/styles.css`; replace template `src/App.tsx`, `src/main.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm build` exits 0 and produces `dist/index.html`
- [ ] `pnpm dev` serves a page rendering "Bren Aviador"
- [ ] `node_modules/` and `dist/` are git-ignored

**Verify:** `pnpm build` → `✓ built in …`, `dist/index.html` exists

**Steps:** Scaffold `pnpm create vite@latest tmp-scaffold --template react-ts`, rsync into repo root, rm tmp (create-vite prompts on non-empty dirs); `pnpm install` + `pnpm add` the three @fontsource packages + `pnpm add -D vitest`; remove template boilerplate (src/App.css, src/index.css, src/assets, public/vite.svg); replace index.html/src/main.tsx/src/App.tsx and create src/styles.css exactly as in plan Task 1 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-13-portfolio-redesign.md); add vitest config to vite.config.ts; add "test": "vitest run" script; `pnpm build`; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "pnpm-lock.yaml", "tsconfig.json", "vite.config.ts", "eslint.config.js", ".gitignore", "index.html", "src/main.tsx", "src/App.tsx", "src/styles.css"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && test -f dist/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pnpm build exits 0 and produces dist/index.html", "dev server renders Bren Aviador", "node_modules and dist git-ignored"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Design tokens, fonts, full stylesheet
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The complete token-driven stylesheet (paper/ink, type, margin-notes grid, portrait, responsive collapse) plus self-hosted font imports.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/styles.css` (full content in plan Task 2)
- Modify: `src/main.tsx` (@fontsource imports for Instrument Serif 400/400-italic, IBM Plex Sans 400/500, IBM Plex Mono 400/500)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Fonts load locally (bundled woff2, no external font hosts)
- [ ] `pnpm build` exits 0
- [ ] Body renders in IBM Plex Sans on #faf7f2 paper

**Verify:** `pnpm build` → exits 0; dev page shows warm paper background

**Steps:** Add the six @fontsource imports to src/main.tsx; replace src/styles.css with the full stylesheet from plan Task 2 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-13-portfolio-redesign.md); build; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/styles.css", "src/main.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fonts self-hosted via @fontsource", "build exits 0", "paper/ink tokens applied to body"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Typed content data modules
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All page content (profile, experience, projects, awards) as typed data, refreshed from resume v6.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/data/profile.ts`, `src/data/experience.ts`, `src/data/projects.ts`, `src/data/awards.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm exec tsc -b` exits 0 (strict typecheck)
- [ ] Experience lists EMAPTA (2025—now) first and condensed "Earlier" internships entry last (7 entries)
- [ ] Projects contains 10 entries; Project Tempo has no URL

**Verify:** `pnpm exec tsc -b` → exits 0

**Steps:** Write the four data files with the exact content from plan Task 3 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-13-portfolio-redesign.md); typecheck; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/data/profile.ts", "src/data/experience.ts", "src/data/projects.ts", "src/data/awards.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm exec tsc -b", "acceptanceCriteria": ["strict typecheck passes", "7 experience entries EMAPTA first Earlier last", "10 projects, Tempo without url"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: ASCII conversion utility with tests (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure, unit-tested luminance→character conversion and grid sizing in `src/lib/ascii.ts`.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/ascii.ts`
- Test: `src/lib/ascii.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes all tests
- [ ] Black maps to `@`, white to space; transparent pixels render as space
- [ ] `gridSize` halves rows to compensate for ~2:1 mono glyph aspect

**Verify:** `pnpm test` → all tests pass

**Steps:** TDD — write src/lib/ascii.test.ts from plan Task 4 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-13-portfolio-redesign.md), run `pnpm test` expecting FAIL (cannot resolve ./ascii), write src/lib/ascii.ts (DEFAULT_RAMP ' .:;+*#@', luminance, charForLuminance, gridSize, asciiFromPixels) exactly as in plan, run `pnpm test` expecting PASS, commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/ascii.ts", "src/lib/ascii.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all vitest tests pass", "black->@ white->space transparent->space", "gridSize halves rows"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: AsciiPortrait component + headshot asset
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A React component that converts `public/headshot.jpg` to ASCII at runtime, cross-fades to the photo on hover/focus, and falls back to a "BA" block.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/AsciiPortrait.tsx`
- Create: `public/headshot.jpg` (curl from the Cloudinary URL in plan Task 5)
- Modify: `src/App.tsx` (temporary visual-check wiring)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Portrait renders as ASCII characters in the browser
- [ ] Hover/focus reveals the real photo
- [ ] Missing headshot.jpg shows the "BA" fallback without layout errors
- [ ] `pnpm build` exits 0

**Verify:** `pnpm build` → exits 0; manual check in `pnpm dev`

**Steps:** `mkdir -p public && curl -fL -o public/headshot.jpg '<Cloudinary URL in plan Task 5>'`; write AsciiPortrait.tsx exactly as in plan Task 5 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-13-portfolio-redesign.md) — Image load → canvas cols×rows via gridSize → asciiFromPixels → <pre>, tabIndex figure, img.portrait-photo overlay, failed→BA fallback div; wire into App.tsx; build; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/AsciiPortrait.tsx", "public/headshot.jpg", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ASCII renders from headshot", "hover/focus reveals photo", "BA fallback on missing image", "build exits 0"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Page sections and composition
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The full editorial page — nav, masthead, about, experience, projects, awards, contact — rendered from the data modules.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/Nav.tsx`, `src/components/Masthead.tsx`, `src/components/Section.tsx`, `src/components/About.tsx`, `src/components/Experience.tsx`, `src/components/Projects.tsx`, `src/components/Awards.tsx`, `src/components/Contact.tsx`
- Modify: `src/App.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All sections render in order with margin-notes layout (dates/tags in the mono margin)
- [ ] Anchor nav scrolls to about / experience / projects / contact
- [ ] Layout collapses to a single column below 720px (notes above content)
- [ ] `pnpm build` exits 0

**Verify:** `pnpm build` → exits 0; manual check at 360px/720px/1200px

**Steps:** Write the eight components and App composition exactly as in plan Task 6 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-13-portfolio-redesign.md): Nav (mono anchors), Masthead (h1 + tagline + AsciiPortrait), Section (section-head + children), About (profile.about + tech-list), Experience (rows: note=dates, entry h3 role · company + description), Projects (rows: note=tag, serif-italic linked name — blurb), Awards (rows: note=year, text), Contact (footer: invite, mailto/github/linkedin links, colophon). Build, responsive check, commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/Nav.tsx", "src/components/Masthead.tsx", "src/components/Section.tsx", "src/components/About.tsx", "src/components/Experience.tsx", "src/components/Projects.tsx", "src/components/Awards.tsx", "src/components/Contact.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all sections render with margin notes", "anchor nav works", "single column below 720px", "build exits 0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Meta tags, favicon, 404 fallback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Publication hygiene — OG tags, an SVG favicon, and a 404.html copy for Pages.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (favicon link + OG tags)
- Create: `public/favicon.svg`
- Modify: `package.json` (build script appends `&& cp dist/index.html dist/404.html`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `dist/404.html` exists after build and equals `dist/index.html`
- [ ] Favicon renders in the browser tab
- [ ] OG title/description/url present in built HTML

**Verify:** `pnpm build && diff dist/index.html dist/404.html` → exits 0, no diff output

**Steps:** Write public/favicon.svg ("BA" on paper) and add favicon link + og:title/og:description/og:type/og:url metas to index.html head exactly as in plan Task 7 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-13-portfolio-redesign.md); change build script to `tsc -b && vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html`; verify; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "public/favicon.svg", "package.json"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && diff dist/index.html dist/404.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["404.html equals index.html after build", "favicon renders", "OG tags in built HTML"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: GitHub Actions deploy to Pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every push to `master` tests, builds and deploys the site to GitHub Pages; the live site serves the new portfolio.

**Files:**
- Create: `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Repo Pages source set to "GitHub Actions" (`build_type: workflow`)
- [ ] Workflow run on `master` completes green (test → build → deploy)
- [ ] `curl -s https://brenfreeze.github.io/` returns HTML containing "Bren Aviador" and a Vite `assets/index` bundle reference (not the old Tailwind CDN page)

**Verify:** `gh run watch --exit-status` → success; `curl -s https://brenfreeze.github.io/ | grep -c 'assets/index'` → ≥ 1

**Steps:** Write .github/workflows/deploy.yml exactly as in plan Task 8 (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-13-portfolio-redesign.md): push to master + workflow_dispatch, pages/id-token permissions, build job (checkout, pnpm/action-setup + node 22 with pnpm cache, pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm test, pnpm build, upload-pages-artifact from dist) + deploy job (deploy-pages). Then `gh api repos/brenfreeze/brenfreeze.github.io/pages -X PUT -f build_type=workflow` (POST if 404). Commit, push, `gh run watch`, curl-verify live site (CDN may cache a few minutes — retry with ?nocache=timestamp).

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/deploy.yml"], "verifyCommand": "gh run watch --exit-status && curl -s https://brenfreeze.github.io/ | grep -c 'assets/index'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Pages build_type=workflow", "workflow green on master", "live site serves Vite build"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
